name: CANstressGetInfo
title: CANstressGetInfo
syntax: long CANstressGetInfo( char softwareVersion[], long swVersionBufLen, char firmwareVersion[], long fwVersionBufLen, char serialNumber[], long snBufLen, char canInterface1[], long if1BufLen, char canInterface2[], long if2BufLen );
description: Delivers information on CANstress software and the connected CAN hardware.

parameters.name: softwareVersion
parameters.description: Buffer in which the version of the software is written (recommended buffer size: 20 Byte).

parameters.name: swVersionBufLen
parameters.description: Size of the buffer in which the software version is written (in bytes).

parameters.name: firmwareVersion
parameters.description: Buffer in which the version of the firmware is written (recommended buffer size: 10 Byte).

parameters.name: fwVersionBufLen
parameters.description: Size of the buffer in which the firmware version is written (in bytes).

parameters.name: serialNumber
parameters.description: Buffer in which the serial number of the CANstress hardware is written (recommended buffer size: 20 Byte).

parameters.name: snBufLen
parameters.description: Size of the buffer in which the hardware serial number is written (in bytes).

parameters.name: canInterface1
parameters.description: Buffer in which the type of the CAN interface 1 of the CANstress hardware is written (recommended buffer size: 40 Byte).

parameters.name: if1BufLen
parameters.description: Size of the buffer in which the type of the CAN interface1 is written (in bytes).

parameters.name: canInterface2
parameters.description: Buffer in which the type of the CAN interface 2 of the CANstress hardware is written (recommended buffer size: 40 Byte).

parameters.name: if2BufLen
parameters.description: Size of the buffer in which the type of the CAN interface 2 is written (in bytes).

return: Buffer in which the version of the software is
availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
